text: telangana cms emergency meeting on petrol, lpg and urea stocks on march 25 afternoon. urea stocks too would be discussed at the meeting with officials
original_text: Telangana CM’s emergency meeting on petrol, LPG and urea stocks on March 25 afternoon. Urea stocks too would be discussed at the meeting with officials

text: three killed in a road accident in kurnool. kummari sekhar was first hit by a speeding lorry and was left critically injured on the road as locals rushed to rescue him, another lorry rammed into the group, killing two of the rescuers on the spot
original_text: Three killed in a road accident in Kurnool. Kummari Sekhar was first hit by a speeding lorry and was left critically injured on the road; as locals rushed to rescue him, another lorry rammed into the group, killing two of the rescuers on the spot

text: assam floats tender for satellites to monitor floods, borders. chief minister sarma announced the projectin the 2025-26 state budget the procurement is for at least five satellites in low-earth orbit
original_text: Assam floats tender for satellites to monitor floods, borders. Chief Minister Sarma announced the project in the 2025-26 State Budget; The procurement is for at least five satellites in low-earth orbit
